(y/n), Enter selection, etc. ΓÇö a normal shell prompt like `$` or `#` does NOT count), call the vscode_askQuestions tool to ask the user, then send each answer using send_to_terminal with id="e43a3859-cdf3-46c9-8596-533cbaab1e6c" (which returns the next few lines of output).
